tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: BREAKING: Tesla Model Y was the best-selling vehicle overall in New Zealand for the month of June.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：突发新闻：特斯拉 Model Y 是新西兰 6 月份最畅销的汽车。

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: 今晚刷到一姐@heyibinance 这条，币安正式进入菲律宾。 我第一反应不是又攻下一城，而是这事和币安美股 30 天破 10 亿 AUM 是同一条线： 币安最强的地方，不是只服务华尔街看得见的人，而是去服务那些长期被传统金融忽略的人。 菲律宾、东南亚、新兴市场，这些地方不是没需求。 他们也想买美股、用稳定币、参与全球资产，只是以前门槛太多，路太绕。 币安现在做的，就是把路铺到他们门口。 别人还在卷存量，币安在开新地图。 这才是领头羊真正可怕的地方。 不是喊口号全球化，是真的一个市场一个市场打进去。 @heyibinance @binancezh @cz_binance #Binance #BNB

POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: Just some public market read through from Chinese private VC markets: Institutions are pouring funds into physical AI and world models. 1. Large models / LLMs: ~$23.56B 2. AI infrastructure + technical layer: ~$15.74B 3. Embodied intelligence / physical AI: ~$13.36B 4. AIGC applications: ~$8.79B 5. Autonomous driving + other Top-20 cluster: ~$3.82B, but not apples-to-apples with the above. Some notes: - "Early-stage pure foundation-model funding is basically closed". Looks like more funding is just being put into existing leaders and going into World Model companies. My guess is that we'll likely see the same in the US with Anthorpic/OpenAI consolidation. - "World models have become the biggest consensus in early-stage investment." I said months ago 4D AI/World Models would be the most interesting moving forward, and called out $AEVA as potential exposure. But there's not exactly any pure play exposure. But probably next we'll wait for the next IPOs here in this sector maybe H1 next year. - AIGC application sector is the most mature for AI technology commercialization "Artificial Intelligence Generated Content commercialization is mature but no clear winner yet". Makes sense. in the US there's stuff like Grok Imagine, Google Nano Banana, etc. no clear winner too. especially for video. _ TLDR: Continued funding into AI infrastructure/semiconductor supply chains. Huge capital rotation influx into physical AI / embodied brain / humanoids + world models from capital inflow. Consolidation around leading frontier model companies. Personally just validated what I've been focusing on with Agility Robotics and physical AI players (eg. leaderdrive, harmonic, etc) in public markets... As new potential opportunities in terms of capital rotation. But sadly no world model pure play exposure yet.
tweets.translated: 只是一些公开市场对中国私人风险投资市场的解读：机构正在将资金投入到物理人工智能和世界模型中。 1. 大型模型/法学硕士：~$23.56B 2. AI 基础设施 + 技术层：~$15.74B 3. 实体智能/物理 AI：~$13.36B 4. AIGC 应用：~$8.79B 5. 自动驾驶 + 其他 Top-20 集群：~$3.82B，但与上述不相媲美。一些注释： - “早期纯基金会模式融资基本关闭”。看起来更多的资金正在投入到现有的领导者和世界模特公司中。我的猜测是，我们可能会在美国看到同样的情况，Anthorpic/OpenAI 的整合。 ——“世界模式已成为早期投资的最大共识。”几个月前我说过 4D AI/世界模型将是最有趣的进展，并称 $AEVA 为潜在的曝光。但并没有任何纯粹的游戏曝光。但接下来我们可能会等待该领域的下一次首次公开募股，也许是明年上半年。 - AIGC应用领域是人工智能技术商业化最成熟的领域“人工智能生成内容商业化已经成熟，但尚未出现明显的赢家”。有道理。在美国，有 Grok Imagine、Google Nano Banana 等，但也没有明显的赢家。特别是对于视频。 _ TLDR：继续为人工智能基础设施/半导体供应链提供资金。大量资本从资本流入转向物理人工智能/具身大脑/类人机器人+世界模型。围绕领先的前沿模型公司进行整合。就我个人而言，我刚刚在公开市场上验证了我一直关注的 Agility Robotics 和物理人工智能玩家（例如 Leaderdrive、Harmony 等）......作为资本轮换方面的新潜在机会。但遗憾的是还没有世界模特纯比赛曝光。

tweets.content: So positive readthrough on the upstream glass substrate supply chain: - Sumitomo Chemical and Samsung Electro-Mechanics formally establish JV in Korea within the year to handle the glass core substrate business (GlaSSEM). Main thing was timeline/funding was finalized: "full scale commercialization targeted H2 2027" for the Samsung/Dongwoo JV / KRW 482.1B planned capital. Think the "full scale commercialization" is the word to highlight, since that would imply timeline moving faster than expected than starting ramp or early production H2 2027. So... TGV/LIDE with $LPK (that I own)/E&R and Onto in terms of yields are just some examples of possible sector beneficiaries. Since companies like LPK stated in the past: “80% of customers among major global players have selected LPKF equipment” and targeted "70% of LIDE market share target for TGV in the glass-core ramp". These players also typically have revenue pulled forward, since equipment orders during capex cycle hit before actual ramp. Regardless, just an update on developments.
tweets.translated: 上游玻璃基板供应链的正面解读： - 住友化学与三星电机年内正式在韩国成立合资公司，负责玻璃核心基板业务（GlaSSEM）。最主要的是时间表/资金已最终确定：三星/东宇合资公司/计划资本 482.1B 韩元的“全面商业化目标是 2027 年下半年”。认为“全面商业化”是需要强调的词，因为这意味着时间表的进展比预期的要快于 2027 年下半年启动或早期生产的速度。所以... TGV/LIDE 与 $LPK（我拥有）/E&R 和 Onto 在收益率方面只是可能的行业受益者的一些例子。由于LPK等公司过去曾表示：“全球主要企业中80%的客户都选择了LPKF设备”，并瞄准了“玻璃芯坡道TGV LIDE市场份额70%的目标”。这些参与者的收入通常也会提前，因为资本支出周期中的设备订单在实际增长之前就达到了。无论如何，只是更新进展情况。

tweets.content: Be SemiAnalysis: - Post a scathing piece on CPO delays + optical company valuations, causing a crash. Which $NVDA, analyst desks, and major optical companies refuted - Launch an institutional photonics ETF after optical names dropped 40-60%.
tweets.translated: Be SemiAnalysis： - 发表一篇严厉的文章，批评 CPO 延迟+光学公司估值，导致崩盘。 NVDA、分析师和主要光学公司反驳了这一点——在光学公司股价下跌 40-60% 后推出机构光子学 ETF。
